title: Psychiatrists
description: Diagnose, treat, and help prevent mental disorders.

tasks.text: Prescribe, direct, or administer psychotherapeutic treatments or medications to treat mental, emotional, or behavioral disorders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Gather and maintain patient information and records, including social or medical history obtained from patients, relatives, or other professionals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design individualized care plans, using a variety of treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with physicians, psychologists, social workers, psychiatric nurses, or other professionals to discuss treatment plans and progress.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze and evaluate patient data or test findings to diagnose nature or extent of mental disorder.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine or conduct laboratory or diagnostic tests on patients to provide information on general physical condition or mental disorder.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel outpatients or other patients during office visits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise or inform guardians, relatives, or significant others of patients' conditions or treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach, take continuing education classes, attend conferences or seminars, or conduct research and publish findings to increase understanding of mental, emotional, or behavioral states or disorders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and evaluate treatment procedures and outcomes of other psychiatrists or medical professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit case reports or summaries to government or mental health agencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve on committees to promote or maintain community mental health services or delivery systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
